(IN ADDITION, NAMED DEFENDANTS SHALL EITHER SUPPLY PLAINTIFF WITH AN 18 X 36 KARMEN CABINET, OR REIMBURSE HIM $534.00. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
